name: smartreach
description: Reads SmartReach teams, campaigns, prospects, email settings, do-not-contact records, users, and accounts; creates/updates prospects and accounts, manages campaign membership/status, do-not-contact entries, and task status.

risk.read: read-only team/campaign/prospect/email-setting/do-not-contact/user/account data from a connected SmartReach account
risk.write: creates/updates prospects and CRM accounts, enrolls/unenrolls prospects in outbound campaigns, starts/stops entire campaigns, changes prospect engagement status, blacklists emails/domains from outreach, and changes sales task status
risk.approval: required for all 10 write actions; read is unapproved
